Plaintiff Trimark Erf Inc.'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jul-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Cook, Esq. (415-989-4730) of Cook Collection Attorneys for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is discussed. Plaintiff reports they are in the midst of settling the case. The Court vacates the tentative ruling and rules as follows:

Plaintiff Trimark Erf Inc.'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is continued to July 19, 2017 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 per Plaintiff's request. Plaintiff to send notice. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/RBU)
